resource_role: Protein identifier mapping and protein-protein association metadata

evidence_boundary.can_support: Traceable STRING identifier mapping or association-resource provenance.
evidence_boundary.cannot_support: Physical binding, direct mechanism, causality, or disease relevance from association scores alone.
evidence_boundary.privacy_or_access: Public metadata request only. Do not submit private manuscript text, patient data, PHI, or unpublished data.
evidence_boundary.handoff: Use this packet as Reef resource evidence for Iceberg, Anchor, or Compass. Do not treat it as primary experimental validation.
